zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱格局延续
zh.content:
价格60040附近震荡，24小时微跌0.27%，整体呈横盘偏弱结构，短线动能不足，多空在60100附近反复争夺，市场观望情绪较浓

MACD处于-12.16附近，动能柱偏负，空头略占优势；价格低于SMA20(60113)，均线压制明显，反弹承压，短期延续弱势

下方支撑关注59880及60000整数关口，上方阻力60200与60113均线区域，区间收敛明显波动收窄

操作建议以区间思路为主，60000上方轻仓试多，跌破59880则顺势短空，严格设置止损控制风险建议等待确认信号避免追涨杀跌

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is moving in tight consolidation around 60040 with minimal daily volatility. Price action shows slight bearish bias after failing to sustain above short-term average. Market structure suggests indecision, with neither bulls nor bears establishing dominance. The narrow range between intraday high and low indicates compression, often preceding a directional breakout once volume expands and momentum returns in coming sessions.

MACD shows bearish momentum as histogram remains negative at -12.16, indicating persistent downside pressure despite lack of strong acceleration. Price trading slightly below SMA(20) at 60113 suggests short-term weakness and potential resistance overhead. Absence of RSI limits momentum confirmation, but overall signals point to fading bullish strength and gradual transition into corrective or sideways phase unless momentum improves in the near term overall bias.

Immediate support sits near 59880, aligned with intraday low, followed by a stronger psychological zone around 59500 where buyers may re-enter. On the upside, resistance is clustered at 60113 SMA20 and recent high 60205. A sustained break above 60205 could open path toward 60500, while failure to hold 59880 risks deeper retracement within consolidation range structure remains range-bound in the near term with volatility remaining compressed.

Traders may consider range-bound strategies, buying near support and taking partial profits near resistance. Breakout traders should wait for confirmation above 60205 or below 59880 before positioning. Risk management remains essential due to low volatility conditions, with tight stops recommended. Until momentum strengthens, caution favors mean-reversion setups over aggressive trend-following entries in current market environment while monitoring macro catalysts closely.
